medicines.name: Timolol 0.5% Eye Drops
medicines.information: Used for glaucoma treatment. Reduces intraocular pressure.

medicines.name: Latanoprost 0.005% Eye Drops
medicines.information: First-line treatment for glaucoma. Apply at bedtime.

medicines.name: Brimonidine 0.2% Eye Drops
medicines.information: Reduces IOP by decreasing aqueous humor production.

medicines.name: Dorzolamide 2% Eye Drops
medicines.information: Reduces IOP. Can be used as adjunct therapy.

medicines.name: Ofloxacin 0.3% Eye Drops
medicines.information: Antibiotic for conjunctivitis and corneal ulcers.

medicines.name: Ketorolac 0.5% Eye Drops
medicines.information: NSAID for pain and inflammation post-surgery.

medicines.name: Atropine 1% Eye Drops
medicines.information: Long-acting cycloplegic. Used for uveitis and amblyopia.
